fixes.origin:
needle = json.dumps({"tags": [tag]})
query = "SELECT id, meta FROM articles WHERE meta @> '" + needle + "'::jsonb"

fixes.replacement:
needle = json.dumps({"tags": [tag]})

cur.execute(query, (needle,))

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "query" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
